svg.text: One validation engine runs on both sides; the publication audit wraps it with the gates only a human or a live check can run.
The TC and its editors: “Is the document ready?”
The publication event: “Did we publish it right?”
filenames · case · front matter · anchors · fonts
placeholders · schema $id · stage naming · junk files
RUN oasis-pub-check IN THE TC'S OWN CI
before submission, in the TC's own build:
the TC runs the exact gate TC Administration runs
the TC owns “the document is ready”
all 164 conditions: observed vs expected, in full
the vote is on a clean package
package + Validation Report received by TC Administration
the whole 164-check validation layer plugs in here
trust, but verify: identical code, our side
GATES ONLY A HUMAN OR LIVE CHECK CAN RUN
live ground truth the tool never sees
15 mandatory gates, evidence recorded; verdict computed, not asserted
the shared record of the publication
